product.name: Arox T1 WR/WP
product.specLine: 120 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
descriptions: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane waterproof fabric for all kind of medical cloth. Tested for EN 14126. Arox T1 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical suits.
It can be washed at 60'C and used again.
120 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 800N ; Weft > 650N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: descriptions: 'Arox T1 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical suits.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product is explicitly described as a medical barrier fabric intended for medical suits, isolation gowns and surgical gowns.

evidence: descriptions: 'Arox T1 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical suits.'
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as a barrier medical fabric for isolation and surgical gowns, with EN 14126 certification for infective agents.

secondary.rationale: No independently stated secondary end use; chemical protection and waterproof properties support the medical barrier function rather than a separate application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN 13034/EN 343 chemical protection standards relate to the medical barrier gown context, not a separate general workwear use.
